nodes.name: Webhook: New Lead
nodes.notes: POST /webhook/new-lead. Body: { name, phone, email, source, inquiry_text, interested_project?, campaign_id? }. Optional: language, raw_intent_fields.

nodes.name: Supabase: Insert Lead
nodes.notes: Creates the lead row. Returns full row including UUID.

nodes.name: Code: Build Embedding Body
nodes.notes: v2 RAG step 1: builds the Gemini embedding request body for the buyer's combined inquiry. Same node id as the legacy Get Properties so connection maps remain valid after re-import.

nodes.name: Gemini: Embed Inquiry
nodes.notes: v2 RAG step 2: Gemini text-embedding-004 returns a 768-dim vector for the buyer's combined inquiry. RETRIEVAL_QUERY task type asymmetrically pairs with the RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT embeddings stored in property_embeddings (best practice from Gemini docs).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inquiry_embedding: $('Gemini: Embed Inquiry').first().json.embedding.values, preferred_city: $('Code: Build Embedding Body').first().json.preferredCity, budget_lakhs: $('Code: Build Embedding Body').first().json.leadBudget, match_count: 6 }) }}

nodes.name: HTTP: RAG Match Properties
nodes.notes: v2 RAG step 3: calls the match_properties_for_inquiry RPC from migration 0009. Returns the top-6 properties by cosine similarity to the inquiry embedding, with soft boosts for matching city + budget band. This is the actual retrieval step in retrieval-augmented generation.

nodes.name: Supabase: Get Historical Feedback
nodes.notes: Calls a Postgres function lead_feedback_aggregate() that returns by_source and top_objections_by_project for the last 90 days. If the function does not exist yet, this node returns an empty object and the workflow proceeds without historical context. Create the function via supabase/migrations/0002_feedback_function.sql (see docs/INSTALL.md).

nodes.name: Code: Build Context
nodes.notes: Merges lead, properties (filtered), and feedback into a single object for the Gemini prompt.

nodes.name: Code: Score Lead (Retry+Fallback)
nodes.notes: v3.1 production hardening (replaces the single-shot Gemini: Score Lead HTTP call). Implements Gemini retry + model fallback chain: Flash twice → Flash-Lite → Pro. Each attempt enforces the responseSchema built in Code: Build Context. Returns a structured ALWAYS — even on total failure, returns a low-confidence routed-to-manager score so the workflow never blackholes a lead. Tracks model_used + attemptLog for observability.

nodes.name: Code: Parse and Validate Score
nodes.notes: Parses Gemini JSON, clamps numeric ranges, enforces the closed vocabulary for recommended_action. Falls back to escalation if Gemini misbehaves.

nodes.name: IF: Escalate?
nodes.notes: Escalate if confidence < 50 OR budget > 2Cr (200 lakhs). human_request escalation is handled in intent extraction, not here.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_budget_lakhs > 200 ? ('Budget ' + ($('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_budget_lakhs/100).toFixed(1) + 'Cr triggers >2Cr VIP threshold') : ('Confidence ' + $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.confidence + '% < 50% threshold') }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_id, reason: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_budget_lakhs > 200 ? 'vip_budget' : 'low_confidence', overall_score: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.overall_score, filter_diagnostics: $('Code: Build Context').first().json.filterDiagnostics }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_id, overall_score: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.overall_score, recommended_action: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.recommended_action, scoring_ok: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.scoring_ok, attempts_used: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.attempts_used, attempt_log: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.attempt_log, filter_diagnostics: $('Code: Build Context').first().json.filterDiagnostics }) }}

={{ 'fit=' + $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.fit_score + ' urgency=' + $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.urgency_score + ' action=' + $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.recommended_action }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, lead_id: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_id, overall_score: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.overall_score, recommended_action: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.recommended_action, escalated: $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.confidence < 50 || ($('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.lead_budget_lakhs || 0) > 200 } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify((function(){ const lead = $('Supabase: Insert Lead').first().json; const score = $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json; const nm = String(lead.name || '').trim().split(/\s+/); const firstName = nm[0] || 'Unknown'; const lastName = nm.length > 1 ? nm.slice(1).join(' ') : '(Pentahouse)'; const sourceMap = { 'Meta Ad': 'Web Site', 'Google Ad': 'Web Site', '99acres': 'Web Site', 'Housing.com': 'Web Site', 'MagicBricks': 'Web Site', 'CP Referral': 'Partner', 'Walk-in': 'Other', 'WhatsApp': 'Other' }; const espoSource = sourceMap[lead.source] || 'Other'; const desc = [ 'Pentahouse score: ' + score.overall_score + '/100 (fit ' + score.fit_score + ', urgency ' + score.urgency_score + ', confidence ' + score.confidence + '%)', 'Recommended action: ' + score.recommended_action, 'Matched property: ' + (score.matched_property_name || 'none'), 'Inquiry text: ' + (lead.inquiry_text || '(none)'), 'Source attribution: ' + (lead.source || 'unknown'), 'Pentahouse lead id: ' + lead.id ].join('\n'); return { firstName: firstName, lastName: lastName, emailAddress: lead.email || null, phoneNumber: lead.phone || null, source: espoSource, status: score.overall_score >= 70 ? 'In Process' : (score.overall_score >= 40 ? 'Assigned' : 'New'), description: desc, opportunityAmount: lead.budget_lakhs ? lead.budget_lakhs * 100000 : null, opportunityAmountCurrency: 'INR' }; })()) }}

nodes.name: HTTP: Push to EspoCRM
nodes.notes: Pushes the qualified lead to EspoCRM via /api/v1/Lead. Authenticated via X-Api-Key header (an EspoCRM API user). Maps our schema to EspoCRM's standard Lead fields. Falls back to no-op if ESPO_URL or ESPO_API_KEY env vars unset (neverError=true on response).

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ 'EspoCRM push for lead ' + $('Supabase: Insert Lead').first().json.name + ' (score ' + $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.overall_score + ')' }}

={{ ($('HTTP: Push to EspoCRM').first().json.id) ? ('EspoCRM lead id: ' + $('HTTP: Push to EspoCRM').first().json.id) : ('EspoCRM push failed or no id returned: ' + JSON.stringify($('HTTP: Push to EspoCRM').first().json).slice(0, 200)) }}

value.name: ={{ $('Supabase: Insert Lead').first().json.name || '' }}
value.heat: ={{ $('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.overall_score >= 80 ? 'hot' : ($('Code: Parse and Validate Score').first().json.overall_score >= 60 ? 'warm' : 'cool') }}

nodes.name: Google Sheets: Append Lead
nodes.notes: Appends every new scored lead to the 'Leads' tab in the Sales Ops sheet. Sales head sees every lead with score + heat + intent fields without opening the dashboard. Sheet ID hardcoded; rebind Google Sheets credential after import.

nodes.name: HTTP: Trigger Nurture Draft
nodes.notes: v1.1 Activation Loop P0-1. neverError true so a failed Nurture call doesn't black-hole the lead. trace_id propagated from Lead Agent entry.

nodes.name: Code: Intent Completeness
nodes.notes: v1.1 spec rev. 3 P0-1 Step A + A.1. Computes data_sufficiency, missing_fields, critical_missing_count, no_inventory_match. Forces matched_property_id null when no inventory exists.

nodes.name: Switch: Activation Branch
nodes.notes: v1.1 spec rev. 3 P0-1 Step B. Three outputs: 0=activation (sufficient+hot+visit-worthy), 1=gap_fill (insufficient+not-disqualify+under-cap), 2=no_message (fallback).

nodes.name: HTTP: Trigger Gap-Fill Draft
nodes.notes: v1.1 spec rev. 3 P0-1 Step B output 1. Fires Nurture Agent with intent_gap_fill template. neverError=true so Lead Agent never blocks on a failed handoff.
